label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Tesla collects extensive vehicle telemetry and location data to support services, diagnostics, and autonomous driving development. Privacy practices are vehicle-focused rather than behavioral. The company emphasizes not selling data but shares with service providers. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
